notes: Clean login page with email/phone input on first step, password on second step. Two-step auth flow with Next button between steps. SSO option via Google. Minimal DOM complexity.

endpoints.label: Login Form — Email Step
endpoints.description: Email or phone number input field with Next button to proceed to password step

endpoints.label: Login Form — Password Step
endpoints.description: Password input field with Log In submit button (shown after email step)

endpoints.label: Log In with Google
endpoints.description: Google One Tap / SSO button for signing in via Google account

endpoints.label: Forgot Password
endpoints.description: Having trouble logging in? link to password recovery flow

endpoints.label: Sign Up
endpoints.description: Link to create a new PayPal account
